alerts.channelEmailHint: Alert sent to your registered email address
alerts.scheduleNote: Alerts are checked every 6 hours. New tenders will be notified within 6 hours of posting.

hero.headline: Win Government Tenders, Easily
hero.subheadline: TenderSarthi uses AI to find the right GeM tenders for your business, draft bid documents, and alert you before deadlines.

features.title: Everything you need to win tenders

alerts.title: Smart Alerts
alerts.desc: Get notified before tender deadlines so you never miss an opportunity.

ai.title: AI Analysis
ai.desc: Understand tender requirements instantly with AI-powered summaries.

bid.title: Bid Generator
bid.desc: Generate professional bid documents in minutes, not hours.

t1.text: TenderSarthi helped me win my first government contract in just 3 weeks.
t1.name: Ramesh Kumar

t2.text: The AI analysis saves me hours every week. I now bid on 3x more tenders.
t2.name: Priya Sharma

t3.text: Deadline alerts alone are worth the subscription. Never missed one since.
t3.name: Suresh Patel
